Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User is not registered
Test Steps:
1. Open the ECO-DIGIFY app
2. Click on the "Register" button
3. Enter the required user data
4. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and can log in

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User is registered
Test Steps:
1. Open the ECO-DIGIFY app
2. Click on the "Login" button
3. Enter the user credentials
4. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in

Title: Modify User Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Open the ECO-DIGIFY app
2. Click on the user profile icon
3. Click on the "Edit Profile" button
4. Modify the user data
5. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: User profile is successfully updated

Title: Modify Profile
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The user has logged in.
Test Data: Updated details (Name, Surname, Date of Birth, Email, Password, Phone Number)
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Profile" button.
2. Click on the "Edit" button.
3. Update the required details.
4. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's profile is updated and the updated details are displayed.

Title: View Emergencies
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The user has logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Emergencies" button.
2. View the list of emergencies.
Expected Result: The user can view the list of emergencies.

Title: Filter Emergencies
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The user is on the emergency view screen.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Filter" button.
2. Enter the region and province.
3. Click on the "Filter" button.
Expected Result: The user can view the list of emergencies filtered by the selected region and province.

Title: View Tasks
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The user has logged in and selected an emergency.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the selected emergency.
2. View the list of tasks.
Expected Result: The user can view the list of tasks related to the selected emergency.

Title: Sign Up for a Task
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The user has logged in and selected a task.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the selected task.
2. Click on the "Sign Up" button.
Expected Result: The user is signed up for the selected task and the task is added to their list of tasks.

Title: Unsign from a Task
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The user has logged in, selected a task, and signed up for the task.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the selected task.
2. Click on the "Unsign" button.
Expected Result: The user is unsigned from the selected task and the task is removed from their list of tasks.

Title: Logout
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The user has logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged out and redirected to the login screen.

Title: Coordinator Login
Preconditions:
The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection.
The coordinator has a code and password provided by the administrator.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Login" button.
2. Enter the code and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The coordinator is logged in and redirected to the coordinator dashboard.

Title: Login Volunteer
Preconditions:
The application is installed on an Android device with internet connection
The volunteer has a registered account
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Enter the username and password
3. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: The volunteer is correctly authenticated and redirected to the main application screen

Title: Add Emergency
Preconditions:
The application is installed on an Android device with internet connection
The coordinator is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency management screen
2. Click on the "Add Emergency" button
3. Enter the required information (Country, Region, Province, Emergency Type)
4. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The emergency is correctly added to the database with all the provided information

Title: Modify Emergency
Preconditions:
The application is installed on an Android device with internet connection
The coordinator is logged in
The emergency was created by the same coordinator
Test Data: Updated Country, Region, Province, Emergency Type
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency management screen
2. Select the emergency to be modified
3. Click on the "Modify" button
4. Enter the updated information (Country, Region, Province, Emergency Type)
5. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The emergency is correctly updated in the database with the new information

Title: Add Task
Preconditions:
The application is installed on an Android device with internet connection
The coordinator is logged in
The emergency was created by the same coordinator
Test Data: Task Title, Zone, Number of Volunteers, Task Details
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency management screen
2. Select the emergency to add a task
3. Click on the "Add Task" button
4. Enter the required information (Task Title, Zone, Number of Volunteers, Task Details)
5. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The task is correctly added to the database with all the provided information

Title: Modify Task
Preconditions:
The application is installed on an Android device with internet connection
The coordinator is logged in
The task was created by the same coordinator
Test Data: Updated Task Title, Zone, Number of Volunteers, Task Details
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency management screen
2. Select the emergency with the task to be modified
3. Click on the task to be modified
4. Click on the "Modify" button
5. Enter the updated information (Task Title, Zone, Number of Volunteers, Task Details)
6. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The task is correctly updated in the database with the new information

Title: Assign Volunteer to Task
Preconditions:
The application is installed on an Android device with internet connection
The coordinator is logged in
The volunteer is under the coordinator's command
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency management screen
2. Select the emergency with the task to be assigned
3. Click on the "Assign Volunteer" button
4. Select the volunteer to be assigned
5. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The volunteer is correctly assigned to the task and receives a notification

Title: Volunteer Login
Preconditions:
The application is installed on an Android device with internet connection
The volunteer has a registered account
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Enter the username and password
3. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: The volunteer is correctly authenticated and redirected to the main application screen

Title: Modify Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: New personal information and login credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page
2. Edit personal information and login credentials
3. Click on the save button
Expected Result: User profile is updated

Title: Admin Login
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin login page
2. Enter admin credentials
3. Click on the login button
Expected Result: Admin is logged in and can access the application

Title: Volunteer Login
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the volunteer login page
2. Enter volunteer credentials
3. Click on the login button
Expected Result: Volunteer is logged in and can access the application

Title: Logout Functionality
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Click on the logout button
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the login page
3. Verify that the user is no longer logged in
Expected Result: User is successfully logged out and redirected to the login page

Title: Guide/Tutorial Functionality
Preconditions: User is on the application
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the guide/tutorial section
2. Verify that the guide/tutorial is available and accessible
Expected Result: Guide/tutorial is available and accessible to the user

Title: Data Removal upon Disinstallation
Preconditions: Application is disinstalled
Test Steps:
1. Disinstall the application
2. Verify that all data associated with the application is removed from the device
Expected Result: Data associated with the application is successfully removed upon disinstallation

Title: Compatibility with Android 7.0 and Later
Preconditions: Device is running Android 7.0 or later
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on the device
2. Verify that the application is compatible with the device and runs without errors
Expected Result: Application is compatible with Android 7.0 and later and runs without errors

Title: User Interface Design
Preconditions: User is on the application
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application
2. Verify that the user interface is minimalistic, esthetic, and has a usability score of at least 70/100
Expected Result: User interface is minimalistic, esthetic, and has a usability score of at least 70/100

Title: Feedback upon User Actions
Preconditions: User is interacting with the application
Test Steps:
1. Perform an action in the application
2. Verify that the application provides feedback to the user confirming that the action was successful
Expected Result: Application provides feedback to the user upon successful completion of an action

Title: Data Privacy and GDPR Compliance
Preconditions: User is using the application
Test Steps: 1. Verify that the application respects the user's privacy and complies with the GDPR
Expected Result: Application respects the user's privacy and complies with the GDPR

Title: Profile Deletion Functionality
Preconditions: User wants to delete their profile
Test Steps:
1. Request profile deletion
2. Verify that the user's data and associated information are successfully removed
Expected Result: User's data and associated information are successfully removed upon request for profile deletion

Title: Calendar Integration Functionality
Preconditions: User has tasks scheduled
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the application allows for calendar integration
2. Verify that tasks are correctly synced with the user's calendar
Expected Result: Tasks are correctly synced with the user's calendar upon calendar integration

Title: Multilingual Interface Functionality
Preconditions: User wants to change the language of the application
Test Steps:
1. Request to change the language of the application
2. Verify that the user is able to select a different language and that the application interface is updated accordingly
Expected Result: User is able to select a different language and the application interface is updated accordingly

Title: History of Activities Functionality
Preconditions: User has participated in activities in the past
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the application provides a history of the user's past activities
2. Verify that the history includes details of the activities
Expected Result: The history of the user's past activities is available and includes details of the activities.

Title: Create a user profile
Preconditions: The application is installed on the device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Enter the user's personal data and credentials.
4. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result: The user can access and navigate within the application.

Title: Access user profile
Preconditions: The user has registered.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the registered user's credentials.
4. Submit the login form.
Expected Result: The user can navigate within the application.

Title: View emergencies
Preconditions: The user has logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the emergency screen.
Expected Result: The user can view the emergencies segnalate nell’applicazione.

Title: Search for emergencies in user's area
Preconditions: The user has logged in and provided their residence zone.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the emergency screen.
3. Search for emergencies in the user's area.
Expected Result: The user can view the emergenze nella propria zona di residenza.

Title: View tasks related to an emergency
Preconditions: The user has selected an emergency.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the emergency screen.
3. Select an emergency.
Expected Result: The user can view the compiti specifici riguardanti un’emergenza.

Title: Self-assign to a task
Preconditions: The user has selected a task.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
3. Self-assign to the selected task.
Expected Result: The user is assigned to the selected task.

Title: Be assigned to a task by a coordinator
Preconditions: The user has been assigned to a task by a coordinator.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
Expected Result: The user is shown as a participant in the assigned task.

Title: View and manage assigned tasks
Preconditions: The user has been assigned to a task.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
Expected Result: The user can view and manage their assigned tasks.

Title: Access coordinator account
Preconditions: The coordinator has a unique identifier code.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the coordinator's unique identifier code.
4. Submit the login form.
Expected Result: The coordinator can utilize the application.

Title: Add an emergency
Preconditions: The coordinator has logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the emergency screen.
3. Add a new emergency.
Expected Result: The emergency is shown to the volunteers.

Title: Add a task
Preconditions: The coordinator has added an emergency.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
3. Add a new task related to the added emergency.
Expected Result: The task is shown to the volunteers.

Title: Modify a task
Preconditions: The coordinator has added a task.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
3. Modify the details of the selected task.
Expected Result: The coordinator has modified the details of the selected task.

Title: Assign/Deassign volunteers to a task
Preconditions: The coordinator has added a task.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
3. Assign/Deassign the selected volunteer(s) to the task.
Expected Result: The volunteer(s) are assigned/deassigned to the selected task.

Title: Cancel a task
Preconditions: The coordinator has added a task.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
3. Cancel the selected task.
Expected Result: The task is no longer shown to the volunteers.

Title: Access volunteer account
Preconditions: The volunteer has a unique identifier code provided by a coordinator.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the volunteer's unique identifier code.
4. Submit the login form.
Expected Result: The volunteer can access the application.

Title: Receive a notification for task assignment
Preconditions: The volunteer has been assigned to a task.
Test Steps: 1. Launch the application.
Expected Result: The volunteer receives a notification for task assignment.

Title: View assigned task
Preconditions: The volunteer has been assigned to a task.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
Expected Result: The volunteer can view the task they have been assigned to.

Title: Accept assigned task
Preconditions: The volunteer has been assigned to a task.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the task screen.
3. Accept the assigned task.
Expected Result: The volunteer is shown as a participant in the assigned task.

Title: Receive a notification for task removal
Preconditions: The volunteer has been removed from a task.
Test Steps: 1. Launch the application.
Expected Result: The volunteer receives a notification for task removal.

Title: View guide/tutorial
Preconditions: The user has logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the guide screen.
Expected Result: The guide is displayed on the device and the user can scroll through it, close it, or return to the previous screen.

Title: Verify Requirements Tracking Table is displayed.
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the project requirements.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Requirements Tracking Table.
2. Verify that the table is displayed with the correct number of rows (20).
3. Verify that each row contains the following columns: RF, RF ID, Description, Status, and Source Pages.
Expected Result: The Requirements Tracking Table is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify Requirement RF-01 status is "Not Implemented".
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the project requirements.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Requirements Tracking Table.
2. Find the row with RF-01 in the RF column.
3. Verify that the Status column for RF-01 is "Not Implemented".
Expected Result: RF-01 status is "Not Implemented".
